docs.title: Engineering standup 2026-05-07
docs.content:
Engineering Standup 2026-05-07

Participants: alice, bob, carol, dave

alice: Working on the auth token fix, should be done today. PR #42 is in review.
bob: Noticed that the analytics dashboard is slow. Might be related to the database migration we did last week.
carol: I saw a Notion doc about the db migration - it mentioned we need to run ANALYZE after the migration.
dave: Will add that to the runbook.

docs.title: Database Migration Guide
docs.content:
Database Migration Guide

After any schema migration, run ANALYZE on affected tables. This updates statistics and helps the query planner. Failure to do so can cause 10-100x slowdowns on queries that previously used an index.

Steps: 1. Run migration. 2. Run ANALYZE. 3. Monitor query latency for 1h.

expected_edges.note: Meeting notes reference the database migration guide content
